title: Tempting Toasty Moroccan Chicken Tagine
description: A funky and festive Moroccan dish featuring chicken, peppercorns, and coconut cream, cooked to crispy perfection in a paella pan. This kosher-friendly recipe is perfect for a special occasion or a cozy night in.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the chicken to the pan and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the black peppercorns, dried apricots, chicken broth, and salt to the pan, stirring to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the coconut cream and continue to simmer, uncovered, for an additional 5 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the chicken is crispy.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs and crusty bread on the side.
